THE PARTIES' 2010 AGREEMENT PROVIDES TWO COMMISSION PAYMENT AGREEMENTS THAT ARE DISTINCT FROM THE 2007 COMMISSION AGREEMENT. RATHATNICAM AND DEFENDANTS SEEK TO APPLY SELECT PROVISIONS FROM BOTH THE 2007 AND 2010 AGREEMENTS. RATHATNICAM'S CLAIM IS NOT FOR A READILY ASCERTAINABLE AMOUNT THAT IS MEASURABLE BY REFERENCE TO THE 2007 AND 2010 CONTRACTS THEMSELVES. (CIT GROUP/EQUIPMENT FINANCING, INC. V. SUPER DVD, INC. (2004) 115 CAL. APP. 4TH 547.) WHETHER DEFENDANT KILPATRICK IS PERSONALLY LIABLE TO RATHATNICAM IS AN ISSUE TO BE DETERMINED AT TRIAL. DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS TO: RATHATNICAM DECLARATION, EXHIBIT 4 AS HEARSAY; RATHATNICAM DECLARATION, PARAGRAPHS 9 AND 19 AS CONTRARY TO RATHATNICAM'S SWORN DEPOSITION TESTIMONY AND DISREGARD ARE GRANTED. Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF NILS RATNATHICAM Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment - Plaintiff Rathatnicam's Application for Right to Attach is denied. Rathatnicam makes no valid evidentiary showing and the basis for computing damages is not certain. The parties' 2010 agreement provides two commission payment agreements that are distinct from the 2007 commission agreement. Rathatnicam and defendants seek to apply select provisions from both the 2007 and 2010 agreements. Rathatnicam's claim is not for a readily ascertainable amount that is measurable by reference to the 2007 and 2010 contracts themselves. (CIT Group/Equipment Financing, Inc. v. Super DVD, Inc. (2004) 115 Cal. App. 4th 547.) Whether defendant Kilpatrick is personally liable to Rathatnicam is an issue to be determined at trial. Defendants' objections to: Rathatnicam Declaration, Exhibit 4 as hearsay; Rathatnicam Declaration, Paragraphs 9 and 19 as contrary to Rathatnicam's sworn deposition testimony and disregard are GRANTED. Defendants' objections to Rathatnicam Declaration, Page 5, lines 10-14 are DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H.
